chapter_title.ar: باب إِصْلَاحِ الْمَالِ وَ تَقْدِيرِ الْمَعِيشَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 12 – Correcting the wealth and managing the livelihood

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/36)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/36)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَلَيْكَ بِإِصْلَاحِ الْمَالِ فَإِنَّ فِيهِ مَنْبَهَةً لِلْكَرِيمِ وَ اسْتِغْنَاءً عَنِ اللَّئِيمِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad, from one of our companions, from Salih Bin Hamza, from one of our companions who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is upon you with the correction of the wealth, for therein is a stimulant for the benevolent and a self-sufficiency from the wicked ones’.
en.sarwar: 6. It is narrated from him (narrator of previous Fladith) from certain persons of our people from Salih ibn Hamzah from certain persons of our people Hamzah who have said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must manage your wealth properly; it increases respect for you and freedom of want from envious ones.’”
